name: three.ws
description: x402 for VS Code (buyer + paid-endpoint scaffolder), plus @three-ws/x402-fetch (zero-dependency EVM client), @three-ws/x402-server (turn any endpoint paid; advertises USDC + $THREE in one 402), and @three-ws/x402-mcp (self-custodial Solana buyer over MCP). Pays in USDC or $THREE on Solana, and USDC on Base.
